message: 🌱 Add kyverno: [Feature] Show violations as warnings mission (#546)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kyverno-1127-feature-show-violations-as-warnings",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kyverno: [Feature] Show violations as warnings",
+    "description": "[Feature] Show violations as warnings. Requested by 25+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kyverno deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kyverno version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno\nhelm list -n kyverno 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kyverno installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kyverno configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kyverno configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno\nkubectl get configmap -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kyverno\n```\nKubernetes 1.19 allows returning warnings in API responses:\n\nhttps://kubernetes.io/blog/2020/09/03/warnings/?s=03\n\nPerhaps we can use this to report policy violations?"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Feature] Show violations as warnings",
+        "description": "## Related issue\r\n\n## Proposed Changes\n\n- Omitted the generation of events on blocked resources and policies to avoid extra API calls on blocked resources\n\n### Proof Manifests\nLogs:\n\nHere we can see there are no extra API calls when a resource is blocked due to an enforce policy!\n\n##\n```yaml\napiVersion: v1\nkind: ConfigMap\nmetadata:\n  name: roles-dictionary\n  namespace: default\ndata:\n  allowed-roles: \"[\\\"cluster-admin\\\", \\\"cluster-operator\\\", \\\"tenant-admin\\\"]\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno\nkubectl get events -n kyverno --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[Feature] Show violations as warnings\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Related issue\r\n\n## Proposed Changes\n\n- Omitted the generation of events on blocked resources and policies to avoid extra API calls on blocked resources\n\n### Proof Manifests\nLogs:\n\nHere we can see there are no extra API calls when a resource is blocked due to an enforce policy!\n\n## Checklist\r\r\r\r\r\r\r\r\r\n  \n  \n\n## Further Comments",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: v1\nkind: ConfigMap\nmetadata:\n  name: roles-dictionary\n  namespace: default\ndata:\n  allowed-roles: \"[\\\"cluster-admin\\\", \\\"cluster-operator\\\", \\\"tenant-admin\\\"]\"",
+        "name: prepend-image-registry\npolicies:\n  - prepend_image_registry.yaml\nresources:\n  - resource.yaml\nvariables: values.yaml\nresults:\n  - policy: prepend-registry\n    rule: prepend-registry-containers\n    resource: mypod\n    # if mutate rule\n    patchedResource: patchedResource01.yaml\n    kind: Pod\n    result: pass"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kyverno",
+      "incubating",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kyverno"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/issues/1127",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/pull/3573"
+    },
+    "reactions": 25,
+    "comments": 18,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kyverno installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T02:37:30.242Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
